case_title: ICE MACHINES INCORPORATED VS NEW SIAM KITCHEN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $946.03 FILED BY ICE MACHINES INCORPORATED AS TO DEFENDANT NEW SIAM KITCHEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-23-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
TO PLAINTIFF WITHIN 14 DAYS OF THE MAILING OF ORDER.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $23.65 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT NEW SIAM KITCHEN
